name: prince gds
description: Prince Private WhatsApp Bot - Multi Device

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp Session ID (required for bot to work)

OWNER_NUMBER.description: put your Number and name for Owner

owner_react_emojie.description: put one emojie for owner reacts

MODE.description: choose bot mode public or private

BUSINESS_MODE.description: If your deploying bot in WhatsApp Business then make it true

MENU_IMAGE.description: put image url like this as much as you want for menu image or leave it blank for default images

ALWAYS_ONLINE.description: make it true to be always online

antidelete.description: Set true to enable or false to disable this feature

ANTI_LINK.description: it will delete links and kick user

AutoReaction.description: Set to true for reactions in all chats, group for group chats only, private for private chats only, or false to disable

autoreactions_emojies.description: put your favourite emojies for AutoReactions on chats or make it empty for all default emojies

VAR_APP.description: put same app name you entered above

VAR_KEY.description: put heroku key click on accounts scroll down copy that key past here

STATUSVIEW.description: make it true to auto view status and likes

StatusLikes.description: make it true to auto likes on status

StatusEmojies.description: Add your favorites emojies for status likes

STATUS_MSG.value: Your Status has been seen by Prince bot

REJECTSCALLS.description: Set to 'true' to only reject calls, set to 'all' to reject calls and send a message, or set to 'false' to disable it.

CALLMSG.value: For now calls are restricted by my owner

ANTIFAKE_USERS.description: Add numbers to a variable. The bot will remove users from the group for these numbers. If a number is not in the variable, the bot will not take any action. To target all numbers, use this format: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9
